pro_brother.version_description: Guitar Pro tab for vocal, bass, synth, marimba, all kinds of stuff really, piano, organ, hfs two vibraphones are you kidding me?

content:
Author's Note - #26 UK #22 Canada #9 US 1985 from "How to be a Zillionaire" - https://youtu.be/k0RcHdbdIjc

[ch]Bbsus2[/ch]  x13311
[ch]F/Bb[/ch]    x13211


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]               [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
 The message is perfectly simple,  the meaning is clear[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]              [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
 Don't ever stray too far,  and don't disappear, no, don't disappear[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]                [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
Ever had that feeling,      almost broke in two[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]    [ch]F/Bb[/ch]
Said that you were leaving,     like you do, you do,   ooh-ooh[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]              [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
All my dreams came true  last night, all my hopes and fears[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]F/Bb[/ch]
All my dreams came true  once more, in tears, in tears[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
            Be near me,     be near[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]       [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
            Be near me,     be near.     Be near[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]                [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
Never had that feeling,     until I first met you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]    [ch]F/Bb[/ch]
Never felt like kneeling,     now I do, yes, I do,   ooh-ooh[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]              [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
All my dreams came true  last night, all my hopes and fears[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]F/Bb[/ch]
All my dreams came true  once more, in tears, in tears[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
            Be near me,     be near[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
            Be near me,     be near[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]       [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
            Be near me,     be near.     Be near[/tab]


[Instrumental]

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]F/Bb[/ch]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]               [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
 The message is perfectly simple,  the meaning is clear[/tab]

 Don't ever stray too far,  and don't disappear, no, don't disappear[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]

            Be near me,     be near[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
            Be near me,     be near[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]                       [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
(What's your reputation?) Ecstasy! (What's your inclination?) Next  to me![/tab]
